# Plug2

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Plug2;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Plug2 { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
electricity, energy, socket, outlet

## Categories
devices, development
